languages.text: "Отряды зарковских беглецов вовремя сумели их заметить благодаря организованным вами мобильным отрядам, так что поселения оказались предупреждены заранее, храни их {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Отряды зарковских беглецов вовремя сумели их заметить благодаря организованным вами мобильным отрядам, так что поселения оказались предупреждены заранее, храни их {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}".

languages.text: "Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."
languages.original_text: "Отряды зарковских беглецов вовремя сумели их заметить благодаря организованным вами мобильным отрядам, так что поселения оказались предупреждены заранее, храни их {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "The mobile teams you organised allowed Zarkov's squads of runners to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."
"Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."
"Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, God-Emperor save them all."
"The mobile teams you organised allowed Zarkov's squads of runners to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."
"Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

languages.text: 「ザルコフのランナー部隊が間に合って発見したおかげで、コロニーは警告を受け、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}が彼らを救ってくれるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: ザルコフのランナー部隊が間に合って発見したおかげで、コロニーは警告を受け、神皇帝が彼らを救ってくれるだろう。
「ザルコフのランナー部隊が間に合って発見したおかげで、コロニーは警告を受け、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}が彼らを救ってくれるだろう」

languages.text: «Gracias a las unidades móviles que ha establecido, los exploradores zarkovianos han conseguido localizarlos a tiempo y los asentamientos han recibido la voz de alarma al tiempo, que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} los guarde».
languages.original_text: "Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias a las unidades móviles que ha establecido, los exploradores zarkovianos han conseguido localizarlos a tiempo y los asentamientos han recibido la voz de alarma al tiempo, que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} los guarde».
«Los escuadrones de corredores de Zarkov los avistaron a tiempo, así que los asentamientos están sobre aviso. Que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} los ampare».

languages.text: “多亏了您部署的机动部队，扎尔科夫的侦察兵才及时发现了它们，各处定居点也提前收到了预警。愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}保佑他们。”
languages.original_text: "Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: “多亏了您部署的机动部队，扎尔科夫的侦察兵才及时发现了它们，各处定居点也提前收到了预警。愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}保佑他们。”

languages.text: "Dank Eurer mobilen Teams konnten sie die zarkovianischen Späher rechtzeitig orten und alle Siedlungen frühzeitig warnen, der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} stehe ihnen bei."
languages.original_text: "Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: "Dank Eurer mobilen Teams konnten sie die zarkovianischen Späher rechtzeitig orten und alle Siedlungen frühzeitig warnen, der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} stehe ihnen bei."
"Zarkovs Läufereinheiten haben sie rechtzeitig entdeckt und konnten die Siedlungen warnen. Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} stehe ihnen allen bei."

languages.text: "Emrettiğiniz mobil ekipler sayesinde Zarkovlu keşif erleri, Çobanları vaktinde bulmayı başardı. Yerleşimler önden uyarıldı. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} hepsini kurtarsın."
languages.original_text: "Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: "Emrettiğiniz mobil ekipler sayesinde Zarkovlu keşif erleri, Çobanları vaktinde bulmayı başardı. Yerleşimler önden uyarıldı. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} hepsini kurtarsın."
"Zarkov'un koşucu mangaları onları zamanında tespit etmeyi başardı, böylece yerleşimlere uyarı verildi. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} hepsini korusun."

languages.text: « Grâce aux escouades mobiles requises, les éclaireurs zarkoviens ont réussi à les repérer à temps et les colonies ont pu être prévenues. L'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} veille sur eux !
languages.original_text: "Thanks to the mobile teams you ordered, the Zarkovian scouts managed to spot them in time and the settlements had advance warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: « Grâce aux escouades mobiles requises, les éclaireurs zarkoviens ont réussi à les repérer à temps et les colonies ont pu être prévenues. L'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} veille sur eux !
« Des coureurs zarkoviens les ont repérés à temps et ont pu avertir la colonie. Que l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} les garde. »
